case_title: VASHTI LYNN FERGUSON VS. PARADISE LOUNGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERGUSON, VASHTI LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT PARADISE LOUNGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
